extracted_claim: The customer claims the item inside the package is broken.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The images show the exterior box condition and the contents inside, allowing for an assessment of the claim.
claim_status_justification: While the box is clearly crushed (img_1), the items inside (img_2) appear intact and do not show visible signs of breakage or damage. The claim of a broken item cannot be verified visually.
